definition:
A man of the tribe of Levi living at the time of United Monarchy, first mentioned at 1Ch.25.3; 
 son of: Jeduthun (H3038); 
 brother of: Obed-edom (H5654), Mattithiah (H4993H), Zeri (H6874), Jeshaiah (H3470H), Hashabiah (H2811I)
 § Gedaliah = "Jehovah is great"
1) a son of Jeduthun in the time of David
2) governor of Judea
3) son of Pashur, one of the chiefs of Jerusalem in the time of Jeremiah
